titleStmt.title: SII 16.320: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 320. (A.R. No. 374 of 1920.) ANUṀPALLI, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up in front of the old Gōpālasvāmin temple.

This is dated Śaka 1548, Vibhava, Kārtika ba. 2, lunar eclipse. The details are irregular. Śaka 1548 was Kshaya, not Vibhava; there was no lunar eclipse in Kārtika either in the year Kshaya or Vibhava.

It records a gift of land in the sthānamānya of god Gōpālasvāmi in Anuṁpalle in Penakalacherla-sīma belonging to Jagatāpigutti-sīma, to China-Timmaya, son of sthānam Kēśavayya of Vēmulapāḍu by Immaḍi Pāpi-nāyaka, son of Mahānāyaṅkāchārya Attili Peda Papi-nāyaka of Nāgasamudram, for the merit of his parents.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu .
śrī svasti śrīṁ jayābhānudaya Readjayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1548 Anēṭi vibhavasaṁvvatsa
ra kārttika ba 2 lu śrīmadrājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra
pratāpa śrī vīra rāmadēvarāya
layavāru penugoṁḍa śiṁhvā
sanamaṁdu vajraśiṁhvāsanamaṁ
du pṛthvisāṁbrājyaṁ sēyucuṁ
ḍaṁgānu śrīmanmahānāyaṁ
kācāryulayina nāgasamudraṁ Atti
li pedapāpināyani putṛḍa
yina yiṁmmaḍi pāpināyani
gāru jagatāpigutti sīmaku cele
penakalacarla sīmalōnu cele
Anuṁppalle grāmāna gōpālasvāmiki
stānamāṁnyaṁ peddaceruvukiṁda vū
riki paḍamara cinavōḍukiṁda reḍimā
nyāṁnaku vuttarapu

dikkutaṭṭu ciṁtalamaḍi
staḷaṁ bījavari maḍi
kha . yedumuṁnu
cēnu Anupupalleku vuttaraṁ taṭu
vuppara mōdaku vuttaraṁ kālavākaṭi
Aṁcuna bijavari ¿Ø yirasa vēmulapāṭi
sthānaṁ kēśavayyagāri komāruṁḍu cinatiṁ
mmayyaku yī maḍi yī cēnu mā taṁḍri
pedapāpināyaniki mā tallikiṁ puṇyaṁmu
gānu yī sōmagrahaṇa puṇyakālama
ṁddu nīku nī putrapautrapāraṁparyaṁttaṁ
nīku mēmu dhārabōśi yiccina bhūdā
na dharmmasilāśāsanaṁ . śrīkṛṣṇārpa
ṇamastu . yī dēvatāmāṁnyānaku
yavaru vakriṁcinā tanutalli
ḍri rājula vāraṇāśilō vadhiṁProbably tallidaṁḍrādula .
yiṁcina pāpāna bō
dura(ru) gōhatya siśuhatya
braṁhatyādi pātakālu śēsina pāpā
na bōduru . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahā
rēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Ani yēyiṁcina dharmasilā
śāsanaṁ śrīkriṣṇārpaṇa
mastu . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.320 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
